svg.aria-label: validation-canvas — Lean Canvas + VPC, honestly filled
svg.title: validation-canvas — Lean Canvas + VPC, honestly filled
svg.desc: Pixel-art banner for the validation-canvas Claude Code plugin: title at top, Maurya's Lean Canvas grid (Problem · Solution+Key Metrics · UVP · Unfair Advantage+Channels · Customer Segments · Cost Structure · Revenue Streams) with a problem-and-customer-first dual arrow above it, a stress-tests sidebar that hands off to riskiest-assumption-test, a Value Proposition Canvas fit-check strip beneath the grid (Customer Profile ↔ Value Map across Jobs/Pains/Gains and Products/Pain Relievers/Gain Creators), a four-phase footer ribbon (INTAKE · LEAN+VPC · CONSISTENCY · STRESS TESTS), and a footer pipeline note.
svg.text: validation-canvas.md · validation-canvas.html · DESIGN.md · zero network deps
